This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Invalid values for registered properties are serialized as the empty string
  assert_equals: expected "" but got "0px"
[FAIL] Invalid fallback doesn't invalidate var()-reference [<length>, red]
  assert_equals: expected "40px" but got ""
[FAIL] Invalid fallback doesn't invalidate var()-reference [<length> | none, nolength]
  assert_equals: expected "40px" but got ""
[FAIL] Invalid fallback doesn't invalidate var()-reference [<length>, var(--novar)]
  assert_equals: expected "40px" but got ""
Harness: the test ran to completion.
